headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 19, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, winning 13-4 behind a strong performance from Will Warren. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. In other action, the Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, and the Tampa Bay Rays edged the Pittsburgh Pirates in a thrilling 8-7 victory.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Joey Loperfido, who was placed on the 10-day injured list by the Houston Astros due to a right quad strain. The Kansas City Royals transferred James McArthur to the 60-day injured list with a right elbow inflammation, while the Philadelphia Phillies placed Jhoan Duran on the 15-day injured list with a left oblique strain.

The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Chayce McDermott, and the New York Mets traded LHP Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash. The Arizona Diamondbacks traded RHP Junior Fernández to the Milwaukee Brewers, and the Philadelphia Phillies traded RHP Griff McGarry to the Los Angeles Dodgers for future considerations.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Royals 13-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals, winning 13-4 behind a strong performance from Will Warren, who earned the win with 7.0 innings pitched, 11 strikeouts, and 2 earned runs. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Kyle Nicolas earning the win after a strong relief appearance. Tony Santillan secured the save for the Reds.

top_news.title: **Mets Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets suffered a 2-4 loss to the Chicago Cubs, with Carson Kelly leading the Cubs' offense with a home run and three RBIs. Jameson Taillon earned the win for the Cubs, pitching 6.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-7 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Griffin Jax earning the win and Yoendrys Gómez securing the save. Cedric Mullins led the Rays' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Shut Down Giants in 3-0 Rout**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a shutout victory over the San Francisco Giants, winning 3-0. Robbie Ray led the Nationals' pitching effort, while Rafael Devers and Keibert Ruiz were among the impact hitters for the Giants.

top_news.title: **Pirates Take Down Rays 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays in their recent matchup. Junior Caminero and Nick Gonzales led the Pirates' offense, while Jake Mangum and Bryan Reynolds contributed for the Rays.

top_news.title: **Astros Place Joey Loperfido on 10-Day IL**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have placed left fielder Joey Loperfido on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain, effective retroactive to April 18, 2026.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros have traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees in exchange for SS Braden Shewmake.
